ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question asked in the poll */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the poll */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the poll */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster conducting the poll */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population surveyed */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Overall support level for the question */,
  "republican_support" INTEGER /* Support level among Republicans */,
  "democratic_support" INTEGER /* Support level among Democrats */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the poll results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the poll */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the poll active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollster */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used by the pollster */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population (e.g., Registered Voters, Adults) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographics of the population (e.g., age range, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question (e.g., age-21) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_question" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters_questions" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll result */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population surveyed */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support level for the question */,
  "republican_support" INTEGER /* Support level among Republicans */,
  "democratic_support" INTEGER /* Support level among Democrats */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error of the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_category" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_tags_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_versions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollster_polls" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id", "poll_id")
)
